claims.subject: multi-property reporting gap
claims.evidence: every single enterprise deal i'm in asks about multi-property reporting. every one. hotels chains qsr chains retail anyone with multiple locations
claims.object_value: raised in every enterprise deal across hotels, QSR chains, and retail with multiple locations

claims.subject: multi-property reporting gap
claims.evidence: usually they accept the workaround which is exporting per-merchant and stitching it themselves but the bigger they are the less they tolerate that
claims.object_value: smaller enterprises tolerate manual workaround; larger enterprises do not

claims.subject: Marcus Lee
claims.evidence: losing a deal on price you can stomach. losing a deal on a feature you've been asking for for a year is harder
